comparison.note: All three methods confirm hub removal INCREASES p_c. Susceptibility peak shows STRONGER effect than S=0.5.

method_comparison.S05_vs_suscept_note: S=0.5 underestimates ΔF by ~50% relative to susceptibility peak. Grok review claim that S=0.5 inflates the effect is WRONG — the opposite is true.
method_comparison.MR_overestimates: Molloy-Reed overestimates ΔF (623%) due to configuration-model assumptions not holding for BA networks.
